title: kasmos serve MCP Tools
description: MCP tool definitions for the kasmos serve orchestration server. 9 tools exposed via stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 transport.

tools.name: spawn_worker
tools.description: Spawn a worker agent in a new Zellij pane. Creates the pane with the specified role, prompt, and working directory. Registers the worker in the in-memory registry.

prompt.description: Initial prompt for the agent (task instructions)

cwd.description: Working directory. Worktree path for coders, main repo for planner/release. Auto-detected if omitted.

context_files.description: Absolute paths to files the agent should be primed with

tools.implementation_notes: Calls `zellij --session <name> action new-pane --name '<wp_id>-<role>' --cwd <cwd> -- opencode -p <profile> -- --agent <role> --prompt <prompt>`. Registers worker in registry. Returns immediately (non-blocking).

tools.name: despawn_worker
tools.description: Close a worker agent's pane and remove it from the registry.

wp_id.description: Work package ID of the worker to despawn

tools.implementation_notes: Looks up pane from registry. Navigates via zellij-pane-tracker focus-cycling. Calls `zellij action close-pane`. Removes from registry.

tools.name: list_workers
tools.description: List all active worker panes and their current statuses, reconciled with live Zellij pane state.
tools.implementation_notes: Returns in-memory registry reconciled with zellij-pane-tracker get_panes. Detects missing panes (aborted) and stale entries.

tools.name: read_messages
tools.description: Read structured messages from the msg-log pane. Non-blocking, returns current state.

since.description: Return messages after this index (0-based). Omit for all messages.

filter_wp.description: Filter to messages from a specific work package

filter_event.description: Filter to a specific event type (e.g., 'DONE', 'ERROR')

tools.implementation_notes: Dumps msg-log pane via zellij dump-pane. Parses lines matching `[KASMOS:<sender>:<event>]` prefix. Strips ANSI codes before matching. Returns filtered results.

tools.name: wait_for_event
tools.description: Block until a matching event appears in the msg-log pane. Updates the dashboard pane with live status on each poll cycle. Returns on match or timeout.

filter_event.description: Event types to match (e.g., ['DONE', 'ERROR', 'REVIEW_PASS', 'REVIEW_REJECT']). Omit to match any event.

filter_wp.description: Only match events from this work package

timeout_seconds.description: Max seconds to wait before returning timeout (default: 120, from config)

poll_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between poll cycles (default: 5, from config)

status.description: 'event' if a matching event was found, 'timeout' if ceiling exceeded

tools.implementation_notes: Async poll loop: (1) dump msg-log pane, parse new messages since last index. (2) Update dashboard pane via zellij write-chars with formatted worker status table. (3) Check for matching event -> return if found. (4) Check timeout -> return timeout status if exceeded. (5) tokio::time::sleep(poll_interval), repeat.

tools.name: workflow_status
tools.description: Query the current workflow state by scanning spec-kitty task files. Returns wave structure, WP states, and phase summary.

phase.description: Current lifecycle phase derived from artifact presence and WP states

tools.implementation_notes: Scans kitty-specs/<feature>/tasks/ for task files. Reads YAML frontmatter for lane, wave, depends_on. Uses graph.rs for wave computation. Checks for spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md to determine phase.

tools.name: transition_wp
tools.description: Move a work package to a new lifecycle state. Validates the transition against state machine rules. Acquires file lock, updates task file, logs to audit.

reason.description: Reason for transition (logged to audit trail)

error.description: Present if valid=false, explains why transition was rejected

tools.implementation_notes: Validates via state_machine.rs transition rules. Acquires flock advisory lock on task file. Updates YAML frontmatter 'lane' field. Appends AuditEntry to .kasmos/messages.jsonl. Returns validation result.

tools.name: list_features
tools.description: List available feature specs in the repository with their planning status.

wp_summary.description: WP count by lane (present if has_tasks)

tools.implementation_notes: Scans specs_dir (from config) for directories matching ###-* pattern. Checks for spec.md, plan.md, tasks/ in each. Returns sorted list.

tools.name: infer_feature
tools.description: Detect the current feature from environment context (git branch, working directory).
tools.implementation_notes: Uses feature_arg.rs logic. Checks git branch for ###-* pattern (strips -WP## suffix). Falls back to directory name matching. Returns detection result.
